title: trifolium scabrum
intro: Trifolium scabrum, also known as scrub clover or scabrous clover, is a perennial plant species in the legume family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and to treat gastrointestinal issues, due to its high content of saponins and flavonoids. Trifolium scabrum has been reported to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and prevent infections. In herbal preparations, Trifolium scabrum is often used as a tea or tincture, and it can also be consumed as a supplement to support overall health and well-being.
